overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The player moves along neon-lit streets beneath an elevated highway, crosses a large intersection, and observes futuristic architecture with prominent red neon signage. The footage is from a video game engine, featuring heavy atmospheric fog, reflective wet surfaces, and sparse pedestrian activity.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a rain-soaked sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure. A pedestrian in red walks past on the left, while the camera moves forward past another pedestrian standing near a street lamp. The environment is enclosed with metal railings on the left and building walls on the right, illuminated by artificial street lighting and a prominent digital billboard.

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered sidewalk into a wide open intersection. The ground changes to asphalt crosswalk markings as the player crosses the street. A massive skyscraper with red neon 'NO ENTRAAAAA' signage becomes visible on the left. Sparse pedestrians and a single vehicle are present in the intersection, while the elevated highway structure recedes to the left background.

segments.scene_description: In the center of the intersection, the camera tilts upward to admire the massive skyscraper with red neon signage. An orange 'NO VACANCY' neon sign becomes prominent on a nearby building. The rain appears to intensify as the player looks around the open plaza area, with the elevated highway structure now fading into the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along a new street, leaving the main intersection behind. A vehicle passes by on the left while the player approaches a green neon sign for 'LUCY'S EMERGENCY'. Storefronts line the right side of the street, and the tall buildings of the intersection recede into the background as the journey continues through the rain-soaked cyberpunk city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined, rain-slicked underpass into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban intersection and beyond. It begins on a narrow sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, moving past pedestrians and metal railings under the glow of a digital billboard. As the camera exits the covered walkway, the environment opens into a wide asphalt intersection where the highway recedes into the background and a massive skyscraper with red neon signage dominates the skyline. The perspective then tilts upward to take in the towering architecture and a prominent orange no vacancy sign as the rain intensifies across the open plaza. Finally, the camera moves forward away from the intersection, passing a vehicle and approaching a green neon sign for Lucy's Emergency as the city's storefronts line the path ahead.
